name: Home-Made Hot Wings
recipeInstructions:
For REAL spicy wing, use Tabasco Sauce Cut wings at all joints. Discard wing tips. Place the 24 to 30 pieces in absorbent paper towels to dry.
1. HEAT oil in a deep fryer or saucepan to 375°F (190°C) or until a small piece of chicken sinks and rises to the surface.
2. DEEP FRY: Add wings in batches and cook for 8-10 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
3. REMOVE wings with a slotted spoon and place on a plate covered with paper towels to drain excess oil.
4. MELT butter or margarine in a saucepan over medium heat.
5. ADD hot sauce and stir well to combine.
6. PLACE cooked wings in a covered bowl. POUR the sauce over the wings, tossing to coat evenly.
7. COVER the bowl with plastic wrap and let stand for 10 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
8. SERVE immediately on plates lined with paper towels.
